stories.title: Miami GP Sunday Faces Thunderstorm Threat (TIER 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
⛈️ WEATHER ALERT: The Miami GP is at risk.

Sunday's race faces potential THUNDERSTORMS. If lightning is forecast, Miami's safety plan could force a postponement or suspension.

Friday and Saturday look fine — but race day is a 37% rain probability. 🌧️

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #MiamiGP

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
If thunderstorms hit Miami on Sunday, the F1 race must STOP.

That's not just strategy chaos — it could mean abandoning the race entirely.

All that upgrade firepower from Ferrari, McLaren, and Red Bull... vs. Florida weather. ⛈️

#F1Fanrecap #MiamiGP

article.headline: Miami GP Faces Thunderstorm Threat on Race Day Sunday

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Martin Brundle: "If there's a sniff of a victory, I think Lewis is still very much capable of taking that."

Hamilton: 1 Ferrari podium (Shanghai). Then P6 in Japan.

Now Ferrari brings their BIGGEST upgrade of 2026 to Miami. 🏎️

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #LewisHamilton

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Brundle says the 2026 cars suit Hamilton much more than the ground effect era.

He won 7 titles. He's 4th in the standings. He has a world-class car upgrade arriving Friday.

Miami could be Lewis Hamilton's moment. 🏆

#F1Fanrecap #LewisHamilton

article.headline: Brundle: Hamilton Still Capable of Victory as Ferrari Brings Miami Upgrade

image_concepts.label: Image 2A
text_overlay: MIAMI MOMENT?" (Bebas Neue, #FF5722) / "HAMILTON READY FOR VICTORY" (Montserrat, white)

stories.title: Verstappen "Fundamentally Wrong" — FIA Changes Not Enough (TIER 1)

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
The FIA tweaked the 2026 rules for Miami. Verstappen is not impressed.

"The problem is simply that you can tweak these regulations a bit, but fundamentally something is wrong."

He wants V10s or V8s. He's 9th in the standings. 😤

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #Verstappen

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Verstappen wants V10 or V8 engines.

He has an exit clause if Red Bull underperforms.

He's 9th in the championship with 12 points.

Domenicali is in private talks with him. The clock is ticking. ⏱️

#F1Fanrecap #Verstappen

article.headline: Verstappen: FIA Rule Tweaks Not Enough — "Fundamentally Something Is Wrong"

image_concepts.label: Image 3A
text_overlay: FUNDAMENTALLY WRONG" (Bebas Neue, #FF5722) / "VERSTAPPEN vs. THE RULES" (Montserrat, white)

stories.title: FP1 Extended to 90 Minutes — What Teams Need to Learn (TIER 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
FIA has extended FP1 at Miami to 90 MINUTES.

Why? 5-week gap. New reg changes. Sprint format = this is the ONLY practice before qualifying.

Teams have one session to figure out the new rules. Starts Friday noon local / 1PM ET. ⏱️

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #MiamiGP

article.headline: Why Miami's 90-Minute FP1 Matters More Than Any Practice Session This Season

image_concepts.label: Image 4A
text_overlay: 90 MIN FP1" (Bebas Neue, #FF5722) / "FRIDAY MAY 1 — 1PM ET" (Montserrat, white)

stories.title: Constructors' Championship Snapshot — Miami is the Reset (TIER 2)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
F1 2026 Constructors' standings heading into Miami:

🥇 Mercedes: 135 pts (3 wins from 3)
🥈 Ferrari: 90 pts
🥉 McLaren: 56 pts
4. Red Bull: 16 pts

Everyone brings their biggest upgrades THIS WEEKEND. The order could flip. 🔥

#F1Fanrecap #F1 #MiamiGP

article.headline: Constructors' Championship Snapshot: Can Anyone Close the Gap to Mercedes at Miami?
